course_info.title: Sketch App Designer – UI Kits & Prototyping
course_info.description: Master Sketch from wireframes to advanced UI kits. Build reusable components, symbols and quick prototypes for web and mobile interfaces.

description.short_text: Learn practical Sketch workflows, symbols, and UI kits to speed up your design process and prototype faster.
description.long_text:
This course covers Sketch fundamentals and advanced techniques including reusable symbols, responsive layouts, and rapid prototyping. Perfect for UI designers who want to produce consistent interfaces and hand off designs to developers efficiently.

The lessons include hands-on projects and downloadable starter kits.

Create and manage reusable symbols and overrides
Build UI kits for product teams
Export assets and collaborate with developers
Prototype flows and test basic interactions

lectures.title: What is a design system in Sketch

course_info.title: Figma Design System – Build Modern UI/UX Projects
course_info.description: Master Figma design system creation, learn to build scalable components, manage styles, and collaborate effectively on modern UI/UX projects.

description.short_text: Learn how to build a complete, scalable design system in Figma from scratch — including components, styles, typography, and responsive layouts.
description.long_text:
Design systems are the backbone of modern product design, helping teams maintain visual consistency, speed up design workflows, and create cohesive user experiences.

In this course, you'll learn how to build a powerful design system in Figma step-by-step — from color styles and typography to complex interactive components.

Whether you're a beginner designer looking to level up your Figma skills or a professional seeking to create scalable systems for large teams, this course will equip you with the knowledge and tools to confidently manage UI/UX design systems.

what_you_will_learn: Understand how to structure a scalable Figma Design System
Create color, grid, and typography styles that adapt across projects
Build reusable UI components with auto layout and variants
Organize design libraries for team collaboration
Master responsive design techniques within Figma
Implement dark/light mode design patterns
Set up documentation and naming conventions for your design system
Learn how to hand off design systems to developers efficiently
requirements: No prior design system experience required
Figma desktop app installed on your device
Interest in improving your design workflow and consistency

lectures.title: Introduction to the Figma Design System Course
Getting started with your first Figma project
What is a Design System and why it matters in UI/UX design
Creating components and variants in Figma
Building scalable typography and color styles
Sharing your design system with your team
Using Figma comments and feedback loops
Reviewing and improving your design system

course_info.title: Advanced Accounting & Financial Analysis – Master Financial Statements
course_info.description: Master advanced accounting concepts, financial statement analysis, and corporate valuation techniques used by top financial analysts.

description.short_text: Go beyond basic accounting. Learn advanced financial analysis, ratio analysis, cash flow modeling, and corporate valuation.
description.long_text: This comprehensive course takes you from intermediate accounting concepts to advanced financial analysis techniques used by investment bankers, financial analysts, and CFOs. You'll master the art of reading financial statements, building valuation models (DCF, LBO, M&A), and making data-driven investment decisions. The course includes real-world case studies from Fortune 500 companies, Excel templates, and practical assignments that simulate actual work environments in corporate finance and investment banking.

what_you_will_learn: Analyze income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements like a pro
Build advanced financial models (DCF, LBO, M&A) from scratch
Master ratio analysis, trend analysis, and peer benchmarking
Understand corporate valuation techniques and merger modeling
Perform forensic accounting to detect financial irregularities
Create comprehensive financial reports and investor presentations
Use Excel advanced functions for financial modeling
Apply IFRS and GAAP standards to complex accounting scenarios
requirements: A laptop with Excel installed (2019 or later)
Willingness to work through complex case studies

lectures.title: Setting Up Your Financial Analysis Workspace
Balance Sheet Analysis: Assets, Liabilities & Equity
Cash Flow Statement: The Most Important Statement
Liquidity Ratios: Current, Quick & Cash Ratios
Solvency Ratios: Debt to Equity, Interest Coverage
Market Value Ratios: P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA
Excel for Financial Modeling: Best Practices
Calculating Free Cash Flow to Firm (FCFF)
Terminal Value: Perpetuity vs Exit Multiple
Case Study: DCF Valuation of Amazon
Financial Modeling for Startups & High-Growth Companies
Final Project: Complete Financial Analysis Report

instructor.name: Mostafa Mahmoud
instructor.bio: Mostafa Mahmoud is a seasoned finance professional with over 15 years of experience in corporate finance, investment banking, and financial consulting. course_info.title: Professional Translation – Arabic to English Mastery
course_info.description: Become a certified professional translator. Master legal, medical, literary, and technical translation between Arabic and English.

description.short_text: Learn professional translation techniques for legal, medical, literary, and technical content. Prepare for ATA certification.

Translate medical reports, clinical trials, and pharmaceutical documentation
Handle literary translation: poetry, novels, and creative writing
Work with technical manuals, engineering documents, and IT content

Prepare for ATA certification and other professional credentials
requirements: Native or near-native proficiency in Arabic
Advanced proficiency in English (C1 level minimum)
Strong writing skills in both languages

lectures.title: Case Study: Translating a Short Story
